name: Apple Stuffed Squash
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked white or brown rice (cooked in chicken broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place squash cut-side down in a shallow baking pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
3. Turn squash cut-side up; brush with butter.
4. Sprinkle with salt and cinnamon.
5. Combine rice, applesauce, celery, pecans, brown sugar, onion powder, and ginger.
6. Fill squash evenly with rice stuffing.
7. Bake, uncovered, for 20 to 30 minutes.
8. Garnish with apple wedges.
